title: Eva 30 in Italian theatres and 333 BD DVD
display_title: Eva 30 in Italian theatres and 333 BD DVD
wikitext:
[]: Eva 3.0 in Italian theatres & 3.33 BD/DVD             Quote Post by Tetsuo87 » Thu Apr 11, 2013 5:14 pm [center]Update 03: Italian BD/DVD "First Press" will be released October 30, 2013 The new, amazing chapter in the Evangelion saga, just fresh from success at the cinema (1° at the box office with more than 30,000 spectators), available from the end of October on Blu-ray and DVD. (auto translated)

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Apr 11, 2013 5:33 pm If Italy gets this before America does, I'm going to throw something.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Apr 11, 2013 5:35 pm Yurop usually gets the goodies first.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Apr 11, 2013 5:38 pm Fireball wrote: Yurop usually gets the goodies first.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Apr 11, 2013 5:39 pm If I actually end up going to university in Italy I might be able to catch this!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Apr 11, 2013 5:40 pm riffraff11235 wrote: If I actually end up going to university in Italy I might be able to catch this!

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Apr 11, 2013 5:49 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: You would leave me to go to Italy, Riff-raff-san? This isn't like you!

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Apr 11, 2013 5:51 pm Damn Europeans, always getting the good stuff first....

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Fri Apr 12, 2013 5:15 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Damn Europeans, always getting the good stuff first....

[]:             Quote Post by lo zaffo » Tue Apr 16, 2013 12:19 pm I understand that Italy, the place where forgotten times opera houses and theatres reborn into the modern age, let's think about Teatro Olimpico in Vicenza, or Sabbioneta Theatre in Mantova, will have Eva on theatres for good! I will go and see Eva 3.0 on big screen for sure!! Best piece of news of the week!!

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Apr 16, 2013 12:31 pm riffraff11235 wrote: Besides, I don't know if I could stand reading Italian subs.

[]:             Quote Post by xdiesp » Wed Apr 17, 2013 12:41 pm I'll be there! \short victory dance

[]:             Quote Post by Tetsuo87 » Thu Apr 18, 2013 12:59 pm Some news and updates, the only official part, at the moment, are still that Evangelion 3.0 is licensed by Dynit and Nexo for cinema release in autumn of 2013 although there is not yet an announcement, it is now confirmed by various cinemas the screening date is currently scheduled for September 25. In the dubbed version . (like the flayer in the first post) Today has also been published (for the first screening of the anime cycle, Akira) The list of participating cinemas, so it is almost certain that Evangelion 3.0 will be screened in the same number of cinema, (approximately 200), distributed throughout Italy. here the list (official) of the participating cinemas: [url]http://www.nexodigital.it/1/id_301/AKIRA---25-deg--anniversario.asp[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Apr 18, 2013 1:10 pm Tetsuo87 wrote: here the list (official) of the participating cinemas: [url]http://www.nexodigital.it/1/id_301/AKIRA---25-deg--anniversario.asp[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by distopia » Fri Apr 19, 2013 4:49 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Grazie, I was waiting for this list.

[]:             Quote Post by shamlessplug » Sun Apr 28, 2013 4:14 pm cool

[]:             Quote Post by Cookie H Wilson » Tue Apr 30, 2013 8:16 pm Now THIS was unexpected! Grazie!

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed May 01, 2013 3:00 am Does anyone know which one of these cinemas is the easiest to reach from the north by train Cause I need a backup plan for my graduation Amsterdam trip

[]:             Quote Post by Cookie H Wilson » Wed May 01, 2013 10:21 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: Does anyone know which one of these cinemas is the easiest to reach from the north by train Cause I need a backup plan for my graduation Amsterdam trip

[]:             Quote Post by Tetsuo87 » Thu May 02, 2013 11:21 am Update the first post with more info , is now Official for september 25, here the trailer !Heavy Q Spoiler! [url]http://youtu.be/bnY5UL7wX48[/url] or [url]http://youtu.be/xMFXbgolLLQ[/url]
